items.label: Development Complete — Schemas
messages: Let me directly read the existing schema files to understand patterns.
Now I have a clear picture of the existing patterns. Let me also check the tsconfig.
I now have full context on the patterns. Let me create the task schemas and tests.
Now add comprehensive tests for the task schemas:
Now append the task schema tests at the end of the test file:
Now let me build and run tests:
All 65 tests pass (including 33 new task schema tests). Build and tests are green. Let me verify the review of changes:

Review shows minimal structural impact (1% footprint), zero health degradation, no new issues. The breaking changes are from unrelated commits on the branch. My changes are clean additive schemas.  Now let me commit and complete the pipeline:

All done. Here's a summary of what was completed:  ## Schema Development Complete ✅  ### Files Created - **`packages/schemas/src/tasks.ts`** — Four Zod v3 schemas with inferred TypeScript types:   - `TaskStatusSchema` — `z.enum(["TODO", "IN_PROGRESS", "DONE"])`   - `TaskSchema` — Full task entity with `id`, `workspaceId`, `title`, `status`, `createdAt` (ISO-8601), `updatedAt` (ISO-8601)   - `CreateTaskSchema` — Input validation for task creation: `title` with `min(1)` / `max(200)`   - `UpdateTaskStatusSchema` — Status transition input: `status: TaskStatusSchema`  ### Files Modified - **`packages/schemas/src/index.ts`** — Added barrel exports for all 4 schemas and 4 types - **`packages/schemas/src/__tests__/schemas.test.ts`** — Added 33 new tests covering:   - All valid enum values for `TaskStatusSchema`   - Round-trip parse/reject for `TaskSchema` (all fields, invalid status, non-ISO dates)   - Boundary tests for `CreateTaskSchema` (empty, 200-char max, 201-char reject, strip extra fields)   - Valid/invalid status updates for `UpdateTaskStatusSchema`  ### Quality Gates Passed - ✅ `npm run build` — TypeScript compilation clean - ✅ `npx jest --verbose` — 65/65 tests pass (32 existing + 33 new) - ✅ `roam_review_change` — Minimal structural impact (1% footprint), zero health degradation

shellCommands.command: cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && bash tools/autonomous-factory/agent-commit.sh backend "feat(schemas): add TaskStatus, Task, CreateTask, UpdateTaskStatus Zod schemas for kanban board" 2>&1
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/sample-app && npm run pipeline:complete kanban-task-board-enhanced-v2 schema-dev 2>&1
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && bash tools/autonomous-factory/agent-commit.sh pipeline "chore(pipeline): mark Development Complete — Schemas" 2>&1
